request: rank all variants for c5 corvette
title: RANKING EVERY C5 CORVETTE VARIANT
close_narration: Which C5 variant is your favorite?
order_rationale: Ordered from least to most performance-oriented variant.

entries.name: Base Coupe
entries.label: ENTRY LEVEL
entries.one_line_fact: The Base Coupe introduced the C5 generation with a 345-horsepower LS1 V8 engine.

entries.name: Convertible
entries.label: OPEN-AIR EXPERIENCE
entries.one_line_fact: The Convertible offered the same performance as the Coupe with the added thrill of open-top driving.

entries.name: Hardtop (FRC)
entries.label: LIGHTWEIGHT OPTION
entries.one_line_fact: The Fixed Roof Coupe (FRC) was the lightest C5 variant, setting the stage for the Z06.

entries.name: Z06
entries.label: PERFORMANCE KING
entries.one_line_fact: The Z06 featured a 405-horsepower LS6 engine and track-focused enhancements.
